rules.cmd: §8-=-=-=-=== §fi§cAkuna§9MC §8| §cRules §8===-=-=-=-{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Severe insults, prejudice, harassment, threats, hate speech or advocacy of extremist ideologies are prohibited{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Promotion or mention of other servers, websites, social networks or external communities is prohibited{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Bypassing filters, exploiting flaws, bugs or server vulnerabilities is prohibited{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Use of hacks, autoclick, bugs or any type of cheating is strictly prohibited §8(§7includes 2p and controllers with turbo mode§8){n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Account hacking, impersonating staff members or scamming other players is prohibited{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Teaming in solo modes, 1v1 or in matches where it's not allowed is prohibited{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Offensive, inappropriate or provocative names, skins and builds are not allowed{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7Excessive use of CAPS, flood, spam or repetitive messages in chat is prohibited{n}§cSystem §8§l» §r§7It is prohibited to interfere with staff work, disrespect decisions or insult the server
